recommendations.title: Buy Philadelphia 76ers +11.5
recommendations.reason: Recommendation: buy Philadelphia 76ers +11.5. The number gives a large scoring cushion at near-standard juice, which can be attractive in NBA games where late swings make big favorites harder to trust. That extra room matters most when the underdog can stay competitive for stretches even if they do not win outright.

recommendations.title: Buy New York Knicks -6.5
recommendations.matchup: Atlanta Hawks at New York Knicks
recommendations.reason: Recommendation: buy New York Knicks -6.5. The spread is still inside a controlled range and the moneyline agrees, which is usually where favorite-side value is most stable. It gives this team a realistic path to covering without asking them to win by an inflated margin.
